publishedAbstract: - `Quay app` pod reports `InvalidBucketState` and `noobaa-default-backing-store` pod restarting while pushing the image. ~~~ 2025-12-12T01:00:00.026319497Z gunicorn-registry stdout | 2025-12-12 01:00:00,025 [333] [WARNING] [storage.cloud] Error when writing to stream in stream_write_internal at path uploads/eeeee-xxx-ddddd-fffff-wwwww: An error occurred (InvalidBucketState) when calling the UploadPart operation: The request is not valid with the current state of the bucket. 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058652405Z gunicorn-registry stdout | 2025-12-12 01:00:00,058 [333] [ERROR] [data.registry_model.blobuploader] storage.stream_upload_chunk returned error An error occurred (InvalidBucketState) when calling the UploadPart operation: The request is not valid with the current state of the bucket. 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | 2025-12-12 01:00:00,058 [333] [ERROR] [endpoints.v2.blob] Exception when uploading blob to aaa-ccc-ddddd-ddfff-hhhh 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | Traceback (most recent call last): 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | File "/quay-registry/endpoints/v2/blob.py", line 570, in_upload_chunk 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | blob_uploader.upload_chunk(app.config, input_fp, start_offset, length) 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | File "/quay-registry/data/registry_model/blobuploader.py", line 234, in upload_chunk 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | raise BlobUploadException(upload_error) 2025-12-12T01:00:00.058972944Z gunicorn-registry stdout | data.registry_model.blobuploader.BlobUploadException: An error occurred (InvalidBucketState) when calling the UploadPart operation: The request is not valid with the current state of the bucket. ~~~- `noobaa-default-backing-store` status is fluctuating between `Ready` and `Rejected`. ~~~ $ oc get backingstore-n openshift-storage NAME TYPE PHASE AGE noobaa-default-backing-store pv-pool Ready 17d After a while $ oc get backingstore-n openshift-storage NAME TYPE PHASE AGE noobaa-default-backing-store pv-pool Rejected 17d $ oc get po noobaa-default-backing-store-noobaa-pod-xxxx NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE noobaa-default-backing-store-noobaa-pod-xxxx 1/1 Running 98 10d ~~~- `podman push image` to the `quay` registry failed with error: `writing blob: uploading layer chunked: blob upload invalid` ~~~ $ podman push quay_registry/user/image_name:version:version--tls-verify=false--log-level=debug INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug DEBU[0000] Called push.PersistentPreRunE(podman push quay_registry/user/image_name:version:version--tls-verify=false--log-level=debug) [...] DEBU[0092] Trying "quay_registry/user/image_name:version"... DEBU[0092] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/run/containers/storage:overlay.mountopt=nodev,metacopy=on]@e968b576248ab5e4faa7411afa26421531f460626f61cea4c39e609e6a3dbf73" DEBU[0092] Found image "qquay_registry/user/image_name:version" as "quay_registry/user/image_name:version" in local containers storage Error: writing blob: uploading layer chunked: blob upload invalid DEBU[0092] Shutting down engines ~~~- The `noobaa-default-backing-store-noobaa-pod` restarts continously with `OOMKilled` while pushing the image to registry: ~~~ $ oc get po noobaa-default-backing-store-noobaa-pod-xxxx-o json | jq '.status.containerStatuses[] | {container:.name, lastExitCode:.lastState.terminated.exitCode, reason:.lastState.terminated.reason}' {"container": "noobaa-agent", "lastExitCode": 137, "reason": "OOMKilled"} ~~~
publishedTitle: Quay app pod reports InvalidBucketState and noobaa-default-backing-store pod restarting while pushing the image
